rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Cole Hardwares Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment On Sunset Scavengers And Lylian Sifuentes Cross-Complaints
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 26 2020 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT COLE HARDWARE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT and Motion for Summary Judgment On Sunset Scavengers And Lylian Sifuentes Cross-Complaints are continued to june 26, 2020. trial is continued to july 27, 2020. if parties stipulate to a different hearing/trial date after june 26/july 27, 2020 (respectively), parties may notify the Court at DEPARTMENT501CONTESTTR@SFTC.ORG by 8:00am on march 26, 2020. no appearances required. please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 26 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Plaintiffs Third Amended Verified Complaint For Damages, Preliminary And Permanent Injunction Nuisance And Negligence, Declaratory Relief And Failure To Abate Nuisance is continued to june 26, 2020. trial is continued to October 5, 2020. if parties stipulate to a different hearing/trial date after june 26/october 5, 2020 (respectively), parties may notify the Court at DEPARTMENT501CONTESTTR@SFTC.ORG by 8:00am on march 26, 2020. no appearances required. please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA STEINOFF HOLMES VS. DANIEL FELDMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 26 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT DANIEL FELDMAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT overruled, complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Motion to Strike is denied.= (501/CFH)
